description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and extensive use of white and gray tones. The structure features large windows, a covered patio area, and a spacious backyard with a swimming pool and a circular above-ground pool or water tank. The property is surrounded by a low, white perimeter wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs, including flowering trees and manicured grass lawns. The front includes a driveway with a parked car and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. Outdoor living spaces are emphasized, with a shaded dining area and open green zones for recreation.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, and a covered patio, all enclosed by a white perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, carport, and landscaped front yard with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, circular water feature, and outdoor dining area under a canopy.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, large tree, and the house's rear facade with expansive windows and patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, side yard, and the back of the carport and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass door, paved approach, and minimalistic landscaping.
